title: No, My Darling Daughter
writer: Kay Bannerman, Harold Brooke, Frank Harvey
actors: Michael Redgrave, Michael Craig, Roger Livesey
plot: Tansy Carr (Juliet Mills) is the vivacious daughter of a wealthy international industrialist who runs away with a playboy millionaire, but falls in love with the hard-working young man who has been sent to bring her back.
